_publications._publicationTitle: Elucidating Microstructural Alterations in Neurodevelopmental Disorders: Application of Advanced Diffusion-Weighted Imaging in Children With Rasopathies.

_contextSnippet: NDI detected the greatest number of differences between groups and therefore showed the most sensitivity of the three diffusion measures investigated.
details: NDI detected the greatest number of differences between groups and showed the most sensitivity of the three diffusion measures investigated. Lower NDI values found in NF1 and NS compared to TD in subcortical regions with trend NF1 < NS < TD. Largest effect in thalamus: estimated difference 0.044 [95% CI: 0.034, 0.053], d = 2.36
